title: Plowman And Cummins Are Plowman And Cummins
description: Clown duo Plowman and Cummins present a surreal trip to the hairdressers. Expect bouncy blow-dries, falling over, mess, beauty, violence and classical singing. Using absurd visual comedy, physical theatre and splintered narrative, Plowman and Cummins herald a slapstick revival. The salon dissolves into moments of chaos, danger and silliness as objects, costumes and bodies morph in and out of reality. Part-clown part-performance art, ‘Plowman and Cummins are Plowman and Cummins’ is their debut hour-long comedy show, appearing at Brighton Fringe for the very first time. For fans of foolishness, laughing and the feeling you get when you watch someone run for the bus as it drives away.

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 3, 2026 No Comments 3 Mins Read
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 70 % 70% A delightful interlude 7
reviews.excerpt: What happens when a clown goes to the hairdresser? It almost feels like the start of a joke. A premise which certainly proves to be true inPlowman and Cummins are Plowman and Cummins. There’s much packed into this hair-raising hour. From bouffant-primping to slapstick fighting, shaving foam to classical singing. It’s a silly and delightful interlude from real life on the first Saturday of Brighton
